capture.candidate_layout: TypeDuck v1.1.2 RimeCandidate includes quality before reserved
capture.option_delivery: deploy-time common.custom.yaml/default.custom.yaml variants; runtime set_option does not apply these schema __patch hooks
capture.oracle_observable_surface: RimeGetContext selected_candidates records M24 dogfood phrases against TypeDuck v1.1.2 instead of the live deployed web app
capture.settings_profile: default_combined uses no common.custom patches; translator/combine_candidates stays true and translator/prediction_candidate_limit remains 1
capture.m21_constraint: Protects the M21 prediction_candidate_limit=1 browser profile while recording the dogfood phrase order
